Professional

# Lume Porcelain Medium Saucer (12 Pieces)

Fits with Lume Porcelain Lungo Cup

$23.99

You have no Lume Porcelain Medium Saucer (12 Pieces) in your basket. Activate to add the productADD TO BAG

## LUME PRO COLLECTION

Fits with Lume Porcelain Lungo Cup

The LUME Collection sheds a modern glow on Italian elegance.

Imagined by Milanese designer Federica Biasi, the white porcelain cups bring a slight twist to the traditional Italian barista know-how. Its sleek lines, both refined and robust, are complemented by an angular rim for an exceptional experience.

Each cup is designed as the perfect companion to every coffee moment. The five sizes available are adapted to a range of recipes. And with their matching saucers, the cups are perfectly stable and stackable, to fit into any environment, restaurants or cafés, hotels or offices.

A contemporary classic.

Dimensions: height 0.6 in, Ø 5.1 in
